---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# waeponwifestre

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

wǣpen (“penis”, literally “weapon”) + wīf (“woman”) + -estre (“-ster”)
